---
title: "About"
format: dashboard
editor: visual
---

# About the BCHD "Reportable Diseases" Website

## Data Source

## Methodology

## Acknowledgements // Dashboard Development

This website was designed and developed by [Clemence A. Fichet](www.linkedin.com/in/clemence-fichet-8933b4274), an MPH Student concentrating on Epidemiology at the Texas A&M University School of Public Health. This tool was a deliverable part of the Applied Practicum Experience (APEx).
